item.title: There's a rumor that he did, in fact, have some sort of medical episode yesterday, but of course, unlike us, the mere working class, he has an entire team of the best physicians and medicine money can buy. And it's not his money. It's ours.

item.title: Dump on how some things are made. Ancient swords, Silk, Bridges, Balloon printing ... Enjoy
item.description:
Making a sword like in Ancient China.
How silk is made.
Fence wire tensioner.
Automatic screen printing line.
Balloon screen printing machine.
Cheese Slicing Machine.
Bridge girder erection machine placing concrete segments.
Articulated boom crane with a grapple saw.
Rolling up a hose !
Arch support rig.
Applying signage on a museum wall.
Reflex Robotics testing a robot they designed to handle manual labor.
People still buy linoleum ?
This is such a great combo for screwing down deck boards.
Stacking luggage in the belly of a plane.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: God damn it, stop making me agree with her, it’s uncomfortable
item.description: And let me be clear on this, she is 100% aligned with MAGA on literally everything else but these two. Don’t mistake her for a new ally, she’s not. She may not like pedos and foreign wars, but she’ll still throw your Mexican granny, and your lesbian neighbor Franny in the same prison camp TOMORROW.

item.title: Mostly trump administration shot with 3 accidental images
item.description:
Perfect! Especially when they're not that good with technology.
Sneaking, lying, conniving and cheating. It's the MAGA way.
Pilots were punished. Hegseth reversed the punishment calling them patriots. It's like a real life 1984!
Old news. Sorry.
Exactly! Destroying history!
They really have no ability to view things logically.
Good for them, NO ONE should accept an invite from him.
They won't. I was actually FB friends with the guy who called that in. He was the Uber driver who overheard trump's conversation with Epstein. I wasn't totally sure of his story until I saw it in the news recently.
Please! We did you a favor.
Without question.
Our current government doesn't deserve an ounce of respect. But please don't blame the rest of us. We warned them what he'd do.
Someone on X said he was talked in the top 3 in US history. They're truly delusional.
Yes! Effing murderers!
Life long!
Airdrop information across the country making sure they reach every podunk location.
He's a thief!! Always has been, but now thinks he has the right to do it openly.
I love this one,
The people at Maralago should stop coming. That's an insult to all of them.
Random topic change.
More randomness.
I have no idea. I couldn't see what these were.

We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Deal memes. Steal memes. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka

item.title: Jake Tapper reads Trump's unhinged Easter Morning TruthSocial verbatim: "Open the Fuckin' Strait, you crazy bastards..."
item.description: This is something most mainstream media didn't do since their sanewashing is close to 100% nowadays and American's sensibilities are so fucking delicate. I was a little unhappy with how Tapper ended this with a weak disclaimer tone, but it was not unexpected.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: I present to you a new book display that I put up at my local library
item.description: I went to Rockville Public Library in Vernon, CT on Thursday for my internship and I put up books about topics for Dummies on display in the Mezzanine for library patrons to check out. I hope people will learn new things by reading these books about anything that they might be interested in by being librarian-smart. Hope you enjoy seeing this display. This is my favorite part of the job at my local library. Happy Easter!
item.dc:creator: jacobblanck2000

item.title: Ukrainians did something new:
item.description: This attack was one of the largest attacks on Novorossiysk since beginning of the war, lasted more than 3 hours, and Russian AD couldn’t do anything against it! Seems like Ukraine‘s strike UAV attacks against Russian Oil export ports get more and more precise by the day! And there is a reason why. Ukrainians now send long range missiles that deploy a number of smaller drones. These are getting updated target information and attack in swarms.

item.title: Like There's Not Enough WTF Going On - 8 Scientists Missing or Dead: List of Baffling Disappearances in the U.S.
item.description: A string of eight dead and missing scientists is causing concern in the U.S., as some of the disappearances are extremely baffling. One of the missing scientists was a retired Air Force general, and some of the others had professional ties to him. Whether there is any connection is unclear. However, the Bernalillo County Sheriff's Department in New Mexico told Newsweekthat the agency is "looking into this to see if there is any connection at all." That agency is investigating one of the disappearances, of retired Air Force General William "Neil" McCasland. Two of the missing scientists - McCasland and Monica Reza - "had a close professional connection" and disappeared within eight months of each other, according to The New York Post, which described Reza as a "rocket scientist." Some of the deaths do not appear related due to the circumstances, however. Four of the eight suddenly disappeared. Eric Burlison, a Missouri Republican, wrote on X: "The disappearance of multiple scientists and military personnel with ties to advanced research is deeply concerning. I've already requested FBI involvement, and we will keep pressing for answers." Fox News' Will Cain highlighted the issue, saying that the missing and dead scientists dealt with sensitive information. Here is the full list of eight missing and dead scientists: Monica Reza was connected to NASA's Jet Propulsion Lab Project. "She went missing last summer while hiking in California. No trace," said Cain. William McCasland was a retired Air Force General. "He once oversaw funding connected to a project that also included Monica Reza," added Cain. The case has taken a bizarre turn, with McCasland's wife debunking theories relating to UFOs. McCasland is a retired U.S. Air Force general, the Sheriff wrote. McCasland was the Commander of the Air Force Research Laboratory at Wright-Patterson Air Force Base in Ohio. There, he was "responsible for managing the Air Force's $2.2 billion science and technology program as well as additional customer-funded research and development of $2.2 billion," his U.S. Air Force bio says. Carl Grillmair was an astrophysicist at Caltech. "He worked on a NASA-supported space telescope project and infrared systems. Now, he was shot and killed at his home just two months ago," Cain said on the air. However, according to ABC 7, a suspect was charged with killing Grillmair "after carjacking his own relative and burglarizing a home." Grillmair "was found shot to death on the porch of his home in rural Llano." Frank Maiwald was a Senior Scientist at NASA's Jet Propulsion Lab. "He died nearly two years ago but his cause of death has never been made public," added Cain. Two months after Melissa Casias, a 53-year-old Los Alamos National Labs employee, went missing, her disappearance has left more questions than answers. New Mexico State Police reported no breakthroughs in the investigation." She worked at Los Alamos National Labs. "She has been missing since last summer," said Cain, adding that she had "security clearances." In September 2025, the Taos News reported: " Anthony Chavez was aonnected to Los Alamos National Labs. "He disappeared during a walk. No signs. No answers," said Cain. According to Daily Mail, he worked "at the high-security nuclear lab. The facility was founded by the famed Manhattan Project during World War II. It has been tied to nuclear weapons research ever since." Chavez "left his car locked in the driveway and did not take his wallet, keys or other personal items, which were all found inside Chavez's home," Daily Mail noted. Nuno Loureiro Was Shot & Killed When He Answered the Doorbell "Authorities have not connected these cases, but look at the overlap," said Cain. MIT noted, "Nuno Loureiro, a professor of nuclear science and engineering and of physics at MIT, has died. He was 47...A lauded theoretical physicist and fusion scientist, Loureiro joined MIT's faculty in 2016. His research addressed complex problems lurking at the center of fusion vacuum chambers and at the edges of the universe." Jason Thomas was a scientist at Novartis, a Swiss pharmaceutical company, when he went missing in December 2025, according to People. According to People, he was struggling with the deaths of his parents, and no foul play is expected. In March, Middlesex District Attorney Marian Ryan and Wakefield Chief of Police Steven Skory "confirmed that a body was recovered from Lake Quannapowitt...Preliminary information including the clothing of the victim suggests that it is the body of Jason Thomas, 45, who was reported missing to Wakefield Police on December 13, 2025." https://www.miamiherald.com/living/article315304444.html
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @ColeTslaw painted this. I think it's fantastic.
27 Man Tax: Bruce Willis
“The secret of success is sincerity. Once you can fake that you've got it made.” - Jean Giraudoux So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Get rid of the Sunday scaries with these funny memes
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
Most corporate bosses. You’re salaried so get to work
Exactly
I don’t fold laundry.
Yes, they find me frustrating
I’m saving up for winter
Yes. What can you do to make life easier?
This is me
This is the sweetest thing ever
Also chocolatiers
Why are you so mean to the tiny cobbler?
What kind of coffee? I’ve heard light roast preserves more caffeine.
Or just being born rich?
Old magazines were wild
What if it’s both?
I don’t like this but I need to hear it
Why would you be embarrassed? I think that’s sweet.
It came up while I was watching an interesting video
Maybe that’s what we should do: make smaller governments.
Omg
We all know someone like this
Putting a positive spin on things
My age is showing again
My kids at the steak house.
The pee bandit has struck another house!
It’s honestly a good point
When I was a kid, we only ate at BK. My dad hated McDonald’s. Now that I’m grown, I’m allergic but Dad eats there all the time.
For real. I’ve never lost the overhang from birthing babies.
How did he just know how to play them? Like, did he purposely practice those in case of this situation?
I agree, my child
I wish I could remember to do this
My grandfather thinks autism is from the sky or something, despite him definitely having autism and ocd. My kids don’t just get it from nowhere.
I have excellent taste in music. Just ask me, I’ll tell ya.
Dust is human skin, right? So why do abandoned houses still have dust?
Asserting his dominance
Omg
I love how the dump him pillow is red
Peeps are disgusting until I eat them. The sugar fools me
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

item.title: Happy RHM and some impressions from my trip <3
item.description:
Tbf you can barely see my hair lol It was cold at Europa Park. This is me infront of the entrance to their wooden rollercoaster called Wodan. One of the 4 big coasters they have at the park. Me and my friends ended up rotating between those in the end, and we always lined up for front row seats :) So much fun!
Wodan in the distance, in the scandinavian part of the park
Interior of the queue area of Wodan. It's all themed after norse mythology. The waiting times were okay, usually about 15min per coaster, as we went during weekdays and it was still pretty cold (9°C-ish and 2 days had a bit of rain)
Nice view from above. In the far left corner you can see Wodan next to the blue coaster called Blue Fire. It has a crazy acceleration.
Other side from above. The tall one is the silver star, the fastest coaster they have and our favorite. It has a crazy drop and goes up to 127 km/h (about 80 mph). The big dome has a dark coaster, which is not as crazy but still fun.
This is their hardest coaster, Voltron. It's also the newest. Forces of up to 5g make this one stand out, you also go backwards at times and it has so many loops and screws. A ton of fun, just not something you can ride again and again without a break. Sadly the only one that does not have a queue for front row seats, and we have never been lucky enough to get those.
Giant duck
I think that was part of the grimms forest section. No rides there, just showcases of grimms stories, a few of them were interactive.
The geese lady with her geese <3
Austrian part of the park, around a lake with these chill boat rides
Indoor pirates ride
Also pirates
Asian restaurant, which had the pirates ride go through its bottom part. Its hard to tell from this picture, but those people down there are sitting in a boat lol When we went on the pirate ride, and reached the section going through the restaurant, it smelled so nice that we had to go get a table afterwards xD
Same restaurant. Food was good, and not extremely expensive.
French area with easter decorations
More easter decorations
They had shows too. This one was in the italian section.
Flamenco in the spanish section
Sadly a very blurry pic, but this was the last thing we did, a fairy themed boat ride. A nice note to end on, after rotating between the hypercoasters for hours haha. All in all, 3 lovely days at the park, and I cant wait to go back. Now I went to Spain, and I will share pics of my stay here next week :) Have a lovely easter time, and dont forget to drink your water!
item.dc:creator: walpurrga

item.title: Deviousness Day 166
item.description:
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the deviousness discord where they share artwork and sometimes do drawings based on word prompts given by members. its a lot of fun! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have movie nights on some Saturdays! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 was my birthday the other day yay. know previously people have giftied me some stuffs via throne, steam, ko-fi (fees tho ugh), and cashapp from people appreciating what I do with memes here, the discord things and/or just for fun of my birthday towards things. rn id accept cashapp or! united miles. cause have been traveling a lot. so if anyone has united milage they dont use/want since i know there are business like people who have travel for the business things that their work pays for and have seen it around on imgur. if anyone wants to gift me some miles for future travel things lemme know. id take some miles. cause. miles. united just changed their earn rates so just when im starting to travel they have made it more painful for those of us that cant qualify for their cards to earn and do like. award flights or upgrades on 15 hour flights with miles things. Mind you I am in no way begging or expecting things. and also know people have gifted me things in the past so if you want to please poke me via dm here since I would like to direct that occasional generosity I have received from people towards things I could use since I dont game much anymore and not doing throne again since planning on moving at some point so trying to limit my physical stuff until that happens in the next few years. thanks! I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #potato #memes #deviousness #makinmywaydowntown
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: random dock in Florida
item.description: These tourists got a special treat when they walked out on the dock at the place they were staying on the intracoastal waterway. You never know where you're going to see a manatee in Florida. From March through November they are in every bay, bayou, the intracoastal waterway, the Gulf and the Atlantic ocean. They're also in many of the rivers, creeks and springs. All of the pics and videos I post are taken by me. For more OC nature vids check my profile or look for See Through Canoe Company on YouTube, BlueSky, FB & other social media sites.
item.dc:creator: SeeThroughCanoe

item.dc:creator: JamieSays

item.title: I squishy the babies
item.description: I’m leaving the kitten room to go to bed, and I gave mama her wet food doused with water, and her six perfect kittens in the cat cave were calling to me. I HAD to squish them. It wasn’t even that big of a deal. Hardly any squeaks. They’re getting so big and brave and plussed (I had to google that word). Their eyes are open, I know they’re starting to hear, so they are becoming actual kittens. I don’t know if I’m ready for this
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
